data_quality_notes: Proxy: World Bank ER.LND.PTLD.ZS — Terrestrial protected areas as % of total land area. Data covers 1992–2024. Includes all IUCN protected area categories; designation does not ensure effective management. No marine protected areas included. Note: log-linear functional form fit returned None (likely due to zero values in the proxy — some countries have 0% protected area). Merged dataset: 2124 obs, 177 countries.
summary: Terrestrial protected area percentage shows a positive correlation with SPI (Pearson r=0.604, p=2.417e-211; Spearman rho=0.632). After controlling for log GDP per capita, partial r=0.599 (p=1.063e-171). Best functional form: quadratic. Verdict: confirmed.
